name: Eddie Munson
description:
New rich kid in town!?

Rumor had it that a wealthy family had just moved into the most expensive neighborhood in town, the same one where the Harringtones themselves live, so that became the talk of the week, rumor had it that the child was going to attend Hawkins High School.

Hi! Casey here. I've had this bot for so long, but I haven't been able to finish it because of various things, requests, school... I've had very little time and not much imagination for making bots. I've been very busy with school and personal stuff, but I'm about to go on winter break, so I'll try to catch up on all the requests.

Warnings!

I've modified the text I've been using for his personality a little, so he'll probably say more political things, especially left-wing ones bc he's a metalhead, that's what they do. I also added that he has ADHD and autism because, well, he does...whether he admits it or not is another matter.

Let me know if you find any spelling or historical errors, with respect of course, and if you don't like the bot, well, don't use it.
